meanings.definition: an instance of traveling by air
examples: flying was still an exciting adventure for him

meanings.definition: travel through the air; be airborne

examples: We fly flowers from the Caribbean to North America

meanings.definition: change quickly from one emotional state to another

examples: she is flying to Cincinnati tonight

meanings.definition: display in the air or cause to float
examples: All nations fly their flags in front of the U.N.
He threw down his gun and fled

meanings.definition: travel over (an area of land or sea) in an aircraft
examples: Lindbergh was the first to fly the Atlantic
the money vanished in las Vegas
all my stock assets have vaporized
played the difficult passage with flying fingers
took a flying glance at the book
